name: Raisin Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add sugar, evaporated milk, molasses, and chocolate to the melted butter.
3. Heat gently and stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Boil until it reaches the soft ball stage (234°F to 238°F).
6. Remove from heat and allow it to cool to room temperature.
7. Beat the mixture until it becomes creamy.
8. Add raisins, chopped nuts, and vanilla extract.
9. Continue beating until the mixture can hold its shape.
10. Pour the mixture into a well-buttered pan.
11. Cut the fudge into squares.
